concerns.detail: Real full names of students (haoran geng, Yufei Ding) and detailed personal gossip identifying them and their relationships
concerns.excerpt: 今年stanford的phd，haoran geng 的女朋友... Yufei Ding (PKU)... 注意这不是丁老师，是同名学生

concerns.detail: Gendered insult '学术妲己' (academic Daji) and character attack '蛇鼠一窝' targeting students
concerns.excerpt: 纯学术妲 己... 这俩蛇鼠一窝
